mapper.select: SELECT CD, CNTNT, CD_NM, ORD_NO, USE_CCD FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = #{codeGrp} AND USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY ORD_NO ASC
SELECT CD, CNTNT, CD_NM, ORD_NO, USE_CCD FROM NIC92B WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY CD, ORD_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC92B (CD, CNTNT, CD_NM, ORD_NO, USE_CCD) VALUES (#{codeGrp}, #{codeCd}, #{codeNm}, #{ordNo}, #{useYn})
